With everyday life unaffordable and government focused on only those at the very top, its important that you know how I'm fighting back to protect Social Security, bring down costs, and hold this https://t.co/0pRu7akKXZ

Thank you, Father Thomas, for your call for your unity, and for your service to our https://t.co/XtyGzFIyRk

Our nation is stronger when the hard working men and women that build our country can achieve the American dream, and the labor movement fights each day to make that a reality.
 
It was great to share that message at yesterday's NJ Building Trades Conference. https://t.co/GX1KaYFtiG

Thank you to everyone who came out to today’s Constituent Services Fair! 

It was great to see so many people getting the assistance they deserve and being connected with the resources they need. https://t.co/NB0KF0jLpw

Tomorrow is my 9th annual Constituent Services Fair! More than 100 local, state, and federal agencies will be in attendance to answer your questions and connect you with the services you need.

Sign up and vendor list: https://t.co/5CcjfRZHiN https://t.co/cXHgHVyPU4

Congratulations to the Ben Franklin Bridge on 100 years of connecting South Jersey and Philadelphia! Our region has changed a lot during those 100 years, but the Ben has always been there. Here’s to another century!

Today marks four years since the Supreme Court overturned Roe v Wade. In that time, we've seen states crack down on reproductive freedom which has led to women being denied life-saving care. 

In New Jersey, we're lucky to have reproductive freedom enshrined in our constitution.

assessment.summary: The local archive has not captured a tweet from this account that matches TOR Phi's Kurdistan Lens terms yet. Capture more timeline pages and targeted Kurdistan searches before drawing a social-media conclusion.
assessment.whatItWasLike: No Kurdistan, Kurds, KRG/IKBY, Erbil, Peshmerga, Northern Iraq, PKK/YPG, Iraq/Syria, Yazidi/Sinjar, or energy-linked tweet is present in the profile window yet.
